description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/. Define two stages: install and test. In the install stage add an install_docker job that runs before_script: apk add --no-cache py-pip, pip install docker-compose, docker info, docker-compose --version, then script: docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml build, and runs only on the master and dev branches. In the test stage add a test job that depends on install_docker, runs before_script: apk add --no-cache py-pip, pip install docker-compose, docker info, docker-compose --version, apk --update add nodejs nodejs-npm, then script: docker-compose run --rm app npm test, and also runs only on the master and dev branches.
